subject: Address more sonars in drools-pdp
commit_message:
Address more sonars in drools-pdp

Addressed the following sonars:
- either log or rethrow
- call "remove()" for thread-local-storage
- use assertEquals
- only one method call in exception test
- swap arguments in assertEquals
- add assertion to assertThatThrownBy()
- explain @Ignore
- newInstance() was deprecated
- parameterize generic classes
- too many break/continue
- rename fields
- don't use volatile
- use static methods to modify static fields
- close streams
- re-interrupt the thread

Also addressed eclipse warnings:
- unused fields and methods

Issue-ID: POLICY-2616
Change-Id: Iccc9262f5d25a04924a5f0061eebe0a1d3a02a07
Signed-off-by: Jim Hahn <jrh3@att.com>

entries.message:
Patch Set 1: Verified-1

Build Failed 

https://jenkins.onap.org/job/policy-drools-pdp-master-verify-java/1353/ : FAILURE

Unable to build due to a non-resolvable parent POM. Search logs for "[FATAL] Non-resolvable parent POM" to find the logs.

The fix for this is usually to make sure your poms are pointing to parents that exist. Double check:

 * groupId is correct and no typos
 * artifactId is correct and no typos
 * version is correct for branch ( https://jenkins.onap.org/job/policy-drools-pdp-master-verify-java/1353/ )

There are test failures. Please look in the log to identify them. ( https://jenkins.onap.org/job/policy-drools-pdp-master-verify-java/1353/ )

Logs: https://logs.onap.org/production/vex-yul-ecomp-jenkins-1/policy-drools-pdp-master-verify-java/1353
